itemName.zh: VS-24 + VS-33c AK 护木导气箍组合（白色）
itemName.en: AK Vezhlivyy Strelok VS-24 + VS-33c handguard with gas tube (White)

description.zh:
听好了，士兵，这次是我私人的请求。我需要为我手下的兄弟们准备新装备。如果你能帮上忙，你也会获得这些武器的使用权限。

我要两把 AK-100 系列的步枪，统一使用 7.62x39 的口径，一长一短，必须用黑色的 Magpul 弹匣。其他的要求我也写下来了。

AK-103 要求：
 - 后坐力总和小于 285
 - 重量小于 4.5 公斤
 - 人机功效 75 或更高
 - 耐久度至少 85 %
 - “射击场”距离 1000米 或更多
 - Pmag 30 AK/AKM GEN M3 7.62x39 30发AK兼容弹匣

AK-104 要求：
 - 后坐力总和小于 335
 - 重量小于 4.1 公斤
 - 人机功效 80 或更高
 - 耐久度至少 85 %
 - “射击场”距离 500米 或更多
 - 任意 独立战术手电筒
 - Pmag 30 AK/AKM GEN M3 7.62x39 30发AK兼容弹匣
description.en:
Alright, listen up soldier, this time it's more of a personal request. I need new weapons for some of my guys, you'll receive access to these weapons yourself if you can help us out.

I need two AK-100 series rifles, chambered in 7.62x39, one with a short barrel, the other one with a long barrel, both need black magpul magazines. I'll write down the other specifications for you.

AK-103 Requirements :
 - Recoil Sum less than 285
 - Weight less than 4.5 KG
 - Ergonomics 75 or higher
 - Durability higher than 85 %
 - Sighting Range of 1000 Meters or more
 - AK 7.62x39 Magpul PMAG 30 GEN M3 30-Round Magazine

AK-104 Requirements :
 - Recoil Sum less than 335
 - Weight less than 4.1 KG
 - Ergonomics 80 or higher
 - Durability higher than 85 %
 - Sighting Range of 500 Meters or more
 - A Standalone Flashlight
 - AK 7.62x39 Magpul PMAG 30 GEN M3 30-Round Magazine
